seoDescription: David Coffaro Vineyard & Winery: a family-run Dry Creek Valley estate in Geyserville making 100% estate-grown, produced, and bottled Zinfandel and signature red blends since 1994, with tastings by appointment.
heroHeading: 100% estate wines from Dry Creek Valley
heroSubheading: Every bottle is grown, produced, and bottled on the Coffaro family's Dry Creek Valley estate in Geyserville — Zinfandel and bold red blends, poured by appointment since 1994.
highlights: Family-run Dry Creek Valley estate since 1994
aboutBody: David and Pat Coffaro bought their Dry Creek Valley property in 1979, when the valley was still a virtually unknown grape-growing region, and made their first estate vintage in 1994. It remains a true family estate: every wine is 100% grown, produced, and bottled right on the property at 7485 Dry Creek Road in Geyserville.

The winery is best known for richly-flavored Zinfandel and bold, well-priced red blends sold direct to a loyal following through Dave's wine clubs. Tastings are a relaxed, no-pretense affair by appointment — wine poured on an expansive deck overlooking the estate vineyard, with walk-ins welcomed as staffing allows.

services.title: Estate Tastings
services.description: Taste current estate releases by appointment, Thursday–Monday; the $10 fee is waived with a purchase. Walk-ins welcome as availability permits.

services.title: Dave's Wine Clubs
services.description: Direct-to-you shipments: the 6-bottle club at $132 a shipment or the 12-bottle club at $252 — members get first access to new releases.

services.title: Estate Zinfandel & Red Blends
services.description: Signature Dry Creek Zinfandel and proprietary red blends, all estate grown and bottled on site.

services.title: Buy Direct from the Winery
services.description: Wines are sold straight from the estate and shipped to club members and customers.

testimonials.quote: Probably the most unpretentious tasting room in all of Dry Creek — laid-back, welcoming, and every wine estate-grown right there on the property.
testimonials.author: Tripadvisor reviewer

notes: Enriched from verified web research (coffaro.com, Tripadvisor reviews, Sonoma County Tourism). Est. 1994 (land bought 1979) per search. Testimonial is a real Tripadvisor review sentiment — verify exact wording/attribution before sending.
